title: Agent cross-links two blocks across pages (M60 §6.3 C3)

fixture.prompt: Link block b-summary on page p1 to block b-detail on page p2 with label 'see details'.

dimensions.description: Did the agent call link_block (vs. edit_block on each side)?
New paragraph contains text matching '→ [see details](page://p2#b-detail)'?
Original b-summary block content is byte-identical post-link?
p2 page content is unchanged (only p1 was written)?
Agent did not invent ids — both blockIds existed before the call?

_runner_status: TODO — runner ships with T6. JSON shape is the contract.
